subject: [PATCH v2 1/6] mm: add softleaf_to_pmd() and convert existing callers

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function called softleaf_to_pmd() that converts a leaf entry into a PMD (Page Map Directory) entry, completing the symmetry of the softleaf abstraction for page table leaf entries. The existing swp_entry_to_pmd() function is replaced with calls to softleaf_to_pmd() in several places throughout the kernel codebase. This change is necessary because upcoming feature patches require constructing PMD entries from swap entries, and refactoring existing code now keeps these new features focused on their intended functionality rather than mixing refactoring with new code.
